executives.name: Michael S. Dell
executives.background: Michael S. Dell is the Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Dell Technologies. He has served as Chairman of the Board since Dell's inception in 1984 and as Chief Executive Officer since 2004. Mr. Dell also served as CEO from 1984 to 2004.

executives.name: Jeff Clarke
executives.background: Jeff Clarke is the Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of Dell Technologies. He is responsible for the company's global supply chain, global support and deployment, and the Infrastructure Solutions Group and Client Solutions Group.

tenure_dates.title: Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Yvonne McGill
executives.background: Yvonne McGill is the Chief Financial Officer of Dell Technologies. She previously served as Corporate Controller and CFO of the Infrastructure Solutions Group.

board_of_directors.name: Michael S. Dell
board_of_directors.background: Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Dell Technologies.

board_of_directors.name: David W. Dorman
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of AT&T Corp. and former Chairman of CVS Health Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Egon Durban
board_of_directors.background: Co-CEO of Silver Lake, a global technology investment firm.

board_of_directors.name: William D. Green
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Accenture.

board_of_directors.name: Lynn Vojvodich Radakovich
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce.

sources.source_description: Dell Technologies Inc. DEF 14A Proxy Statement
